news.title: Mizuho lifts TSMC CoWoS capacity forecasts as server CPU demand surges

news.title: CME Group to Launch Single Stock Futures on July 27
news.summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced it will launch Single Stock futures across more than 50 of the top U.S. stocks on July 27, pending completion of all regulatory review and processes.
